_description: Upon achieving 7th Milestone, characters meet for Summit. Roll D6 per roster character (not bots/grunts) plus 1 for general population. Pick from supported opinions. Colony Security required before Final Milestone.

entries.name: Independence
entries.description: This colony is strong enough to survive alone. We don't need Unity anymore.

entries.name: Ascension
entries.description: Through research, we have become more than we were. We now have a path to a more advanced state of being.

entries.name: Loyalty
entries.description: This colony has achieved its objectives and so much more. It is time to take our rightful place as a fully-fledged member of the Unity polity.

entries.name: Isolation
entries.description: We are becoming one with this world. It is time for us to fulfil that destiny, to abandon the constraints of the colony and seek out the wilderness.

entries.name: No opinion
entries.description: We are capable of achieving whichever path we choose.

colony_security._note: Must be achieved before Final Milestone can be constructed.

independence.name: Independence
independence.description: With the colony set on a path of independence, you order the large-scale construction of defenses and issue a proclamation.

resolution.defense_network_bonus: If you developed the Defense Network Mission Data Breakthrough, add +1 to rolls unless dice show a double.

entries.name: Total war
entries.description: Unity decides to make an example of you. The colony is obliterated unless you developed the Artificial Construction Mission Data Breakthrough. If so, you must go to War instead.

entries.name: War
entries.description: Unity responds with military force. See the War rules.

entries.name: Negotiations drag on
entries.description: Roll again. Any 8 = War, any 10 = Recognized status.

entries.name: Recognized status
entries.description: Unity grants semi-autonomous status. Your colony becomes an independent, Unity-Allied world.

war_rules.description: Fought in rounds. Each round: 1D6 colony vs 1D6 Unity. Lowest = 1 War Fatigue. Draw = 1 random character killed + reroll. Warzone Breakthrough: Unity also takes 1 War Fatigue on draw. 3 War Fatigue = surrender.

ascension.name: Ascension
ascension.description: Strange machines are built all over the colony as the engineers and scientists push themselves to align the moment of ascension.

resolution.moved_in_time_bonus: If you completed the Moved in Time and Space Breakthrough, select one character that automatically rolls a 6.

per_character.description: They perish in the process as their body or mind rejects ascension.
They undergo ascension and join the new species.
The ascension process succeeds and earns 1 point of ascension energy.

resolution.ascension_energy_check: Tally ascension energy, roll 1D6. Signs of Genetic Modification Breakthrough: +2 energy. If roll exceeds energy = sub-species. If roll <= energy, consult fate table.

fate_table.description: Your colonists become a new psionic sub-species.
Your colonists join into a single hivemind.
Your colonists join into a single hivemind.
Your colonists ascend to become beings of pure thought.
Your colonists leave for a parallel dimension shaped by thoughts.
Your colonists leave for a parallel dimension shaped by thoughts.

loyalty.name: Loyalty
loyalty.description: You have completed all assigned tasks. The only step left is to prepare the colony for formal inclusion as a registered Unity Main World.

colony_future_entries.name: Staging ground for continued colonization missions

character_future_entries.name: Retire if Disloyal, otherwise assigned to a new expedition
Assigned to Unity field agent or other operative
A future as an independent adventurer

isolation.name: Isolation
isolation.description: Your scouts have already selected a suitable location for the new colony. Your characters set out on a lonely march.

entries.description: Someone in the column falls, never to stand again. Random character killed. Roll again unless all dead. Psionic Manipulation Breakthrough: first death gives 1 Wisdom instead.
A random character suffers hardship. Same character twice = death. Roll again unless all dead. Semi-Living Organism Breakthrough: ignore first 2 hardship results.
You have a vision showing how to attain true oneness with nature. 1 Wisdom gained. Roll again unless you have 3 Wisdom (colony founded successfully).

characters_after_end._note: Guidelines for moving characters to other campaigns (5PFH, Bug Hunt, Tactics).
characters_after_end.artifact_limit: Each character can take only one artifact weapon/armor/equipment.
characters_after_end.upgraded_equipment: Can be taken. Character can only take items they were able to use in Planetfall.
characters_after_end.abilities_and_stats: Characters bring all abilities and profile increases earned.
characters_after_end.independence_won: Ship with 2D6 Credits debt already paid + 2 additional Story Points.
characters_after_end.independence_lost: Escaped characters begin with 1 Rival (Enforcers or Bounty Hunters) + 2 additional Story Points.
characters_after_end.isolation_bonus: Select one character: +1 Luck. Only one character from Isolation per new campaign.
characters_after_end.ascension_bonus: Select one character: gains psionic abilities (5PFH Compendium p.17).
